demographics.occupation: manual labourer (heavy physical work / long shifts)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The lump in my groin has always popped back in when I lie down, but today it is stuck, rock hard, and hurts so badly I feel sick.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The groin bulge suddenly became stuck and unbearably painful about 3 hours ago after I lifted a heavy box, and now I feel nauseated and have thrown up once.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden, sharp, severe groin pain about 3 hours ago, right after I lifted a heavy box
symptom_narrative.duration: about 3 hours and constant since it started
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, severe, localised to the groin lump; the lump is rock hard and won't go back in
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so bad I can't stand or walk, and I feel sick
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right groin, and the lump spreads down toward my scrotum
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it came on, not easing at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — lying down used to make the lump flatten out, but not this time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, standing, or trying to walk
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling really sick, I vomited once, and I'm sweaty
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had this groin bulge for about 6 months. It aches and drags and feels heavy after long shifts of heavy work, it gets bigger when I stand or cough, and it always went flat when I lay down. It has never been stuck or this painful before.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: lying on the floor with my knees bent to take the pressure off; I can't stand or walk

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a groin bulge / hernia on the right side for about 6 months that always used to push back in
past_medical_history.how_managed: nothing done for it — it came and went with standing and lying down

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; does heavy physical labour with long shifts; no one else is at home right now

objective_data_offered.value: a hard, tense lump in my right groin, about 5 cm, spreading down toward my scrotum, that won't push back in no matter how I lie
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: the patient's own description of feeling and looking at the lump, not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: the skin over the lump looks a bit red
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective appearance over a video/photo; colour is hard to judge remotely

objective_data_offered.value: I'm sweaty and clammy and feel like I'm going to be sick again
